Header

L:1/8 default note length

Channels

Name| notes...
Name|voice| notes...
voice| notes...
Voices: sine, triangle/tri,
square, sawtooth/saw

Notes

C4: F#3: Bb5:
A-G, optional # or b, octave
440: raw Hz
C4+50: 50 cents sharp
Bb3-20: 20 cents flat

Duration

C4:8 = 8 units
C4: = 1 unit (default)
C4:/2 = half unit
C4:3/2 = 1.5 units
C4:0 = tone anchor (no sustain)
At L:1/8, 1 unit = eighth note

Volume

C4:8=50 50% volume
0-100, slides interpolate

!C4:8 accented strike
200% vol, decays to 100%
over first 1/8th of note

S:8 = 8 units silence

Steps

C4:4>E4:4
Note to note = release + strike

Slides

C4:4>lin:4>E4:4
Glissando with given easing
type between notes

Easings

Custom notes

blue = Bb3+30
Accepts numbers for Hz
or note+/-cents

Tuning

12-TET or Just Intonation
N-EDO scale generator
Notes without an assigned
pitch will not sound.

Rechorder

Each line is a channel. Elements are note:duration=vol or transition:duration joined by >. Volume is optional.
my_lead|saw| f3:8=100>lin:16>g3:24=50>c4:8
my_lead|saw| channel name + sawtooth voice
f3:8=100 play F3 for 8 counts at full volume
lin:16 linear glissando over 16 counts
g3:24=50 arrive at G3 for 24 counts at half volume
c4:8 step (release + restrike) to C4 for 8 counts

Timeline [example song: Want To Love (Just Raw) by Aloboi]

Tuning

Scale Generator

Custom Notes
